messages.message: Unnecessary conditional, the types have no overlap.
Arrow function has a complexity of 9. Maximum allowed is 8.
Function 'ChatbotJobsPageContent' has too many lines (118). Maximum allowed is 60.
Unnecessary conditional, the types have no overlap.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

info.message: Formatting rules are being moved out of ESLint core.

replacedBy.message: ESLint Stylistic now maintains deprecated stylistic core rules.
